subcodes.first_line: These are days of sorrows, and the waves of malice and hatred surge within the hearts of the enemies with the flames of pride and vainglory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ایام احزانست و امواج ضغینه و بغضا در افئده دشمنان شراره کبر و غرور
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for forgiveness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
